summary: This source is a severely truncated fragment of Hannah Arendt's essay 'Truth and Politics' from her book 'Between Past and Future'. It contains only a single partial sentence regarding Plato and his critics, providing insufficient text for a full extraction.

signature_quotes.text: ...Plato may still be better company than his critics.
signature_quotes.context: A brief remark found in the truncated opening fragment of the text.
